TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pakasaw O pakasaw hananay i sa'amisana kasa'etal no 'Amis i, oya mamiselal a pakarongay , pakonglinen no kafafaw a selal ko mira i papotal no niyaro', maedeng cecay a lipay anca mo^tep a romi'ad. O nikonglinan i, ira ko ipapotalay a miki'orip, mi'adop, ;odot, radiw, lisin, kero, mikasoy , misaloma' , misanga' to lalan , paamekang......o maamaaan a saki'orip a tayalan. Tona pikonglinan a romi'ad i, sapoeneren ko faloco' a minanam, milicay to kafokilan. Cowa kanga'ay a miala to kakaenen nai loma' a tayra tora pikonglinan, o nikaenan naira i, saheto o nialaan i omaomahan, ngosngos hananay anca tangtangan to hasapaterep to cahiw no tiyad. Ira ko paysin to nikaenan toya pikonglinan a romi'ad, o dateng i, o dengan o lapot no konga, awakay no tali ato kacipa'ay ko nga'ayay a kaenen. Ya papah no dateng ato foting i, cowa kanga'ay a kaenen. O sapipa'icel to faloco' no tamdaw kona pilalang to kakaenen, roma sato tona pilalang to dateng no palapalaan i, hay misa'icel ko kapah a mi'adop sanay ko patosokan nona demak. Ona pikonglin deng o pipalatamdaw to pakarongay to saki'orip i palapalaan. .
S.PHON: pakasaw o~u pakasaw ńßananaj i sa °amisana kasa °…ôta…ĺ no~u °amis i, o~uja mamis…ô…ĺa…ĺ a pakaro~uŇčaj , pako~uŇč…ĺin…ôn no~u kafafaw a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ko~u mira i papo~uta…ĺ no~u nijaro~u °, ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺipaj an ¶a mo~u Ēt…ôp a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u niko~uŇč…ĺinan i, ira ko~u ipapo~uta…ĺaj a miki °o~urip, mi °a…¨~…ģo~up, ;o~u…¨~…ģo~ut, ra…¨~…ģiw, …ĺisin, k…ôro~u, mikaso~uj , misa…ĺo~uma ° , misaŇča ° to~u …ĺa…ĺan , paam…ôkaŇč......o~u maamaaan a saki °o~urip a taja…ĺan. to~una piko~uŇč…ĺinan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, sapo~u…ôn…ôr…ôn ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° a minanam, mi…ĺi ¶aj to~u kafo~uki…ĺan. ¶o~uwa kaŇča °aj a mia…ĺa to~u kaka…ôn…ôn nai …ĺo~uma ° a tajra to~ura piko~uŇč…ĺinan, o~u nika…ônan naira i, sańß…ôto~u o~u nia…ĺaan i o~umao~umańßan, Ňčo~usŇčo~us ńßananaj an ¶a taŇčtaŇčan to~u ńßasapat…ôr…ôp to~u ¶ańßiw no~u tija…¨~…ģ. ira ko~u pajsin to~u nika…ônan to~uja piko~uŇč…ĺinan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč i, o~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u …ĺapo~ut no~u ko~uŇča, awakaj no~u ta…ĺi ato~u ka ¶ipa °aj ko~u Ňča °ajaj a ka…ôn…ôn. ja papańß no~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ato~u fo~utiŇč i, ¶o~uwa kaŇča °aj a ka…ôn…ôn. o~u sapipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~una pi…ĺa…ĺaŇč to~u kaka…ôn…ôn, ro~uma sato~u to~una pi…ĺa…ĺaŇč to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč no~u pa…ĺapa…ĺaan i, ńßaj misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u kapańß a mi °a…¨~…ģo~up sanaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan no~una …¨~…ģ…ômak. o~una piko~uŇč…ĺin …¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u pipa…ĺatam…¨~…ģaw to~u pakaro~uŇčaj to~u saki °o~urip i pa…ĺapa…ĺaan. .
S.FORM: Pakasaw O pakasaw hananay i sa'amisana kasa'etal no 'Amis i, oya mamiselal a pakarongay , pakonglinen no kafafaw a selal ko mira i papotal no niyaro', maedeng cecay a lipay anca mo^tep a romi'ad. O nikonglinan i, ira ko ipapotalay a miki'orip, mi'adop, ;odot, radiw, lisin, kero, mikasoy , misaloma' , misanga' to lalan , paamekang......o maamaaan a saki'orip a tayalan. Tona pikonglinan a romi'ad i, sapoeneren ko faloco' a minanam, milicay to kafokilan. Cowa kanga'ay a miala to kakaenen nai loma' a tayra tora pikonglinan, o nikaenan naira i, saheto o nialaan i omaomahan, ngosngos hananay anca tangtangan to hasapaterep to cahiw no tiyad. Ira ko paysin to nikaenan toya pikonglinan a romi'ad, o dateng i, o dengan o lapot no konga, awakay no tali ato kacipa'ay ko nga'ayay a kaenen. Ya papah no dateng ato foting i, cowa kanga'ay a kaenen. O sapipa'icel to faloco' no tamdaw kona pilalang to kakaenen, roma sato tona pilalang to dateng no palapalaan i, hay misa'icel ko kapah a mi'adop sanay ko patosokan nona demak. Ona pikonglin deng o pipalatamdaw to pakarongay to saki'orip i palapalaan. .
S.PHON: pakasaw o~u pakasaw ńßananaj i sa °amisana kasa °…ôta…ĺ no~u °amis i, o~uja mamis…ô…ĺa…ĺ a pakaro~uŇčaj , pako~uŇč…ĺin…ôn no~u kafafaw a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ko~u mira i papo~uta…ĺ no~u nijaro~u °, ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺipaj an ¶a mo~u Ēt…ôp a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u niko~uŇč…ĺinan i, ira ko~u ipapo~uta…ĺaj a miki °o~urip, mi °a…¨~…ģo~up, ;o~u…¨~…ģo~ut, ra…¨~…ģiw, …ĺisin, k…ôro~u, mikaso~uj , misa…ĺo~uma ° , misaŇča ° to~u …ĺa…ĺan , paam…ôkaŇč......o~u maamaaan a saki °o~urip a taja…ĺan. to~una piko~uŇč…ĺinan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, sapo~u…ôn…ôr…ôn ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° a minanam, mi…ĺi ¶aj to~u kafo~uki…ĺan. ¶o~uwa kaŇča °aj a mia…ĺa to~u kaka…ôn…ôn nai …ĺo~uma ° a tajra to~ura piko~uŇč…ĺinan, o~u nika…ônan naira i, sańß…ôto~u o~u nia…ĺaan i o~umao~umańßan, Ňčo~usŇčo~us ńßananaj an ¶a taŇčtaŇčan to~u ńßasapat…ôr…ôp to~u ¶ańßiw no~u tija…¨~…ģ. ira ko~u pajsin to~u nika…ônan to~uja piko~uŇč…ĺinan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč i, o~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u …ĺapo~ut no~u ko~uŇča, awakaj no~u ta…ĺi ato~u ka ¶ipa °aj ko~u Ňča °ajaj a ka…ôn…ôn. ja papańß no~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ato~u fo~utiŇč i, ¶o~uwa kaŇča °aj a ka…ôn…ôn. o~u sapipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~una pi…ĺa…ĺaŇč to~u kaka…ôn…ôn, ro~uma sato~u to~una pi…ĺa…ĺaŇč to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč no~u pa…ĺapa…ĺaan i, ńßaj misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u kapańß a mi °a…¨~…ģo~up sanaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan no~una …¨~…ģ…ômak. o~una piko~uŇč…ĺin …¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u pipa…ĺatam…¨~…ģaw to~u pakaro~uŇčaj to~u saki °o~urip i pa…ĺapa…ĺaan. .
